council_balance.description: Reveal cards until 2 different factions appear. First = Trump, second = Elite. Discard revealed cards.

castles_blessing.description: Trailing players draw extra cards and keep the best 8.

intern_rule.description: Playing a rank 0 card draws 1 card from the Vault immediately.

scoring.vp_compression_description: Leader scores x1 on RIGHT instead of x2. Reduces snowball.
scoring.description: VP = cards_in_trick * dial_multiplier. Winner scores immediately.

talents.description: Faction talents trigger when you win a trick with that faction's card. All optional.

RED.name: Rally the Dupes
RED.effect: Rotate dial back one position (counter-clockwise). Net: dial stays where it was.

ORANGE.name: Finders Keepers
ORANGE.effect: Swap 1 hand card with any 1 card from the Crate.

YELLOW.name: Quick Fix
YELLOW.effect: Lead next trick with 2 cards of same faction (5-card trick).

GREEN.name: Saw It Coming
GREEN.effect: Peek top 3 of Vault, keep 1, reorder remaining 2.

BLUE.name: Sleight of Paw
BLUE.effect: Choose 2 opponents; they each swap 1 random card with each other.

PURPLE.name: Pocket the Past
PURPLE.effect: Bank 1 card from hand to score 1 VP. Draw 1. Discard 1.

new_round.description: Reshuffle all cards, reset dial, lowest VP is new dealer.

tuning_notes.right_multiplier_range: 1.5-3. Current 2 gives ~39% of VP from RIGHT tricks.
tuning_notes.blessing_draw_range: 1-4. Current 3/2 improves last-place win rate by ~3pp.
